'''Droxu''' was a ringed [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Cignet system]] on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
An ancient [[Space station/Legends|space station]] orbited the moon which was refitted and later controlled by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]].<ref name="TF" />

{{Moon-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2015-02-05 -->''[[Lords of Nal Hutta]]''
